description_wiki: Malaysia is a country in Southeast Asia.

Southeast Asia is the geographical southeastern region of Asia, consisting of the regions that are situated south of China, east of the Indian subcontinent, and northwest of mainland Australia, which is part of Oceania.

description: traditional Malay woven fabric figured with colored or metallic supplemental wefts, originally from Malay region
description_wiki: Songket or sungkit is a tenun fabric that belongs to the brocade family of textiles of Brunei, Indonesia, and Malaysia.

description: island country in Southeast Asia and Oceania
description_wiki: Indonesia, officially the Republic of Indonesia, is a country in Southeast Asia and Oceania, between the Indian and Pacific oceans.

aliases: Nation of Brunei, the Abode of Peace
description: sovereign country and sultanate on the island of Borneo in south-east Asia, member of the Commonwealth of Nations
description_wiki: Brunei, officially Brunei Darussalam, is a country in Southeast Asia, situated on the northern coast of the island of Borneo.

surface_forms: Eid Mubarak is a day of Muslim celebration after fasting for a month of Ramadan
description: Islamic holiday on the first of Shawwal
description_wiki: Eid al-Fitr is the first of the two main festivals in Islam, the other being Eid al-Adha.

description: holy month of fasting for Muslims, observed on the ninth month of the Islamic calendar
description_wiki: Ramadan is the ninth month of the Islamic calendar.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: public research university in Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: The University of Minnesota Twin Cities (historically known as University of Minnesota) is a public land-grant research university in the Twin Cities of Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States.
